title: 2023 FOMC Press Releases

source.name: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System

summary: This page is a navigation index listing all Federal Reserve FOMC statements and economic projections released in 2023. It contains only dates and titles linking to individual press releases, not the actual policy content itself. As a listing page, it is non-archiveable per ingestion rules and provides no direct policy details, vote tallies, rate decisions, or forward guidance.
key_points: This is a listing/navigation page, not an archiveable source document
Lists 13 items from 2023: 8 FOMC statements and 5 economic projection releases
Covers FOMC meetings: February 1, March 22, May 3, June 14, July 26, September 20, November 1, December 13
Actual policy content resides in individual linked press releases, not this index page
Last Update on page footer shows February 26, 2026, but all content pertains to 2023 events
why_it_matters: This page serves as an organizational index but contains no policy substance. Researchers seeking 2023 Fed policy details must access individual FOMC statement pages and economic projections documents directly. The listing itself cannot serve as a source for RAG or research purposes.

issues_found: Source is a listing_page — non-archiveable per Rule 5
event_type set to 'unknown' which is appropriate for a listing page but confirms this is not a valid archival target
No policy content, vote tallies, rate decisions, or forward guidance present
Source is a container/navigation page with thin signal value

notes: Non-archivable listing page. Does not contain FOMC policy content. Recommend archiving individual FOMC statements from 2023 separately (e.g., December 13, 2023 statement and projections) for research value. The December 2023 meeting included the first rate cut expectation messaging and updated dot plot projections which would be high-value archival targets.
